case_title: JAMES BLAUCH VS. CITIZENS HOUSING CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAUCH, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT CITIZENS HOUSING CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITIZENS HOUSING CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLAUCH, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITIZENS HOUSING CORPORATION THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM DOES NOT PRESENT A BASIS FOR AN AWARD OF MONEY DAMAGES. THEREFORE IT IS NOT A CLAIM WITHIN THE JURISDICTION OF THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BLAUCH, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT CITIZENS HOUSING CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BLAUCH, JAMES
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAUCH, JAMES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITIZENS HOUSING CORPORATION
